sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71611" key="chrolousi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξηρο-λουσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking a dry bath,</tr_> i.e. in hot sand, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
